overview:
## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

Use this function to attach an access instance to a particular keychain item. Alternatively, you can use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccess] attribute when calling either of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemUpdate(_:_:)] methods.

# SecKeychainItemSetAccess(_:_:)

**Function**

Sets the access of a given keychain item.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecKeychainItemSetAccess(_ itemRef: SecKeychainItem, _ access: SecAccess) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **itemRef**: A keychain item.
- **access**: An access instance to replace the keychain item’s current access instance. Use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAccessCreate(_:_:_:)] function to create a default access instance.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

Use this function to attach an access instance to a particular keychain item. Alternatively, you can use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccess] attribute when calling either of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemUpdate(_:_:)] methods.
title: SecKeychainItemSetAccess(_:_:)
